description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm iron If your little one is daddy's delight, then this t-shirt from tantra is a great way to show off his love for the man in his life. Team this cotton T-shirt with denim trousers or shorts and floaters, and flaunt his love for daddy in style.
